title: Velvety Indian Yogurt Kheer
description: A comforting and citrusy Indian dessert featuring full fat yogurt, with a shio-koji cure for added depth of flavor, this kheer is a no-onion-no-garlic friendly treat, perfect for warm evenings.
instructions: In a kadhai, combine the chilled yogurt, shio-koji, sugar, and cardamom powder, and whisk until smooth.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the kheer has thickened slightly.
Stir in the rose water and lemon zest.
Continue to cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the kheer has reached the desired consistency.
Remove the kadhai from the heat and stir in the chopped pistachios.
Let the kheer cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until chilled.
Serve the kheer chilled, garnished with additional pistachios if desired.
